title: L0176
description: Output of an L0176 program — a Learnosity render envelope. `type` selects the Learnosity API surface (questions/items/author); `data` holds the activity payload and `request` the signed request the browser SDK mounts.

type.description: Which Learnosity API the result targets.

data.description: The activity payload (questions/items and their inline question data).

request.description: The HMAC-signed Learnosity request the browser SDK initializes with.
